headline: Deere & Company Board Elects Brent Norwood as Chief Financial Officer
summary: MOLINE, Ill. - Deere & Company announced today that its Board of Directors has elected Brent Norwood, 44, as senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective May 1. Norwood's appointment...
